steps.cmd: set -eu; STATE=.ai-dev-nova-upgrade; mkdir -p "$STATE"; ORIG_BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD); printf '%s' "$ORIG_BRANCH" > "$STATE/orig-branch"; echo "[1/9] 已进入 cc-web2 目录: $(pwd)"; echo "[1/9] 当前分支: $ORIG_BRANCH"; git fetch

set -eu; STATE=.ai-dev-nova-upgrade; SPRINT_NUM=$(git branch -r | sed -nE 's#^[[:space:]]*origin/sprint-([0-9]+)$#\1#p' | sort -n | awk 'END{print}'); if [ -z "$SPRINT_NUM" ]; then echo "未找到远程 sprint 分支" >&2; exit 1; fi; SPRINT_BRANCH="sprint-$SPRINT_NUM"; printf '%s' "$SPRINT_NUM" > "$STATE/sprint-num"; printf '%s' "$SPRINT_BRANCH" > "$STATE/sprint-branch"; echo "[2/9] 目标 sprint 分支: $SPRINT_BRANCH"; if git show-ref --verify --quiet "refs/heads/$SPRINT_BRANCH"; then git checkout "$SPRINT_BRANCH"; else git checkout -b "$SPRINT_BRANCH" "origin/$SPRINT_BRANCH"; fi; echo "[2/9] 已切换到 $SPRINT_BRANCH"

set -eu; STATE=.ai-dev-nova-upgrade; SPRINT_BRANCH=$(cat "$STATE/sprint-branch"); echo "[3/9] 拉取 $SPRINT_BRANCH 最新代码"; set +e; PULL_OUT=$(git pull --ff-only origin "$SPRINT_BRANCH" 2>&1); PULL_CODE=$?; set -e; echo "$PULL_OUT"; if [ $PULL_CODE -ne 0 ]; then echo "[3/9] git pull 失败 exit=$PULL_CODE" >&2; exit 1; fi; echo "[3/9] 拉取完成"

set -eu; STATE=.ai-dev-nova-upgrade; SPRINT_NUM=$(cat "$STATE/sprint-num"); VERSION=$(npm view @chanjet/nova-uikit versions --json 2>/dev/null | SPRINT_NUM="$SPRINT_NUM" node -e 'let raw=""; process.stdin.on("data", (chunk) => raw += chunk); process.stdin.on("end", () => { try { const parsed = JSON.parse(raw); const versions = Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [parsed]; const sprint = process.env.SPRINT_NUM; const matched = versions.filter((v) => new RegExp("^1\\." + sprint + "\\.\\d+$").test(v)).sort((a, b) => Number(a.split(".")[2]) - Number(b.split(".")[2])); if (!matched.length) { console.error("未找到 1." + sprint + ".y 格式的 @chanjet/nova-uikit 版本"); process.exit(1); } process.stdout.write(matched[matched.length - 1]); } catch (e) { console.error(e.message); process.exit(1); } });'); printf '%s' "$VERSION" > "$STATE/version"; echo "[4/9] 命中的 nova 版本: $VERSION"

set -eu; STATE=.ai-dev-nova-upgrade; VERSION=$(cat "$STATE/version"); VERSION="$VERSION" node -e 'const fs = require("fs"); const pkgPath = "package.json"; const pkg = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(pkgPath, "utf8")); const sections = ["dependencies", "devDependencies", "peerDependencies", "optionalDependencies", "resolutions"]; const targets = ["@chanjet/nova-cross-shared", "@chanjet/nova-shared", "@chanjet/nova-uikit-compat", "@chanjet/ai-runtime", "@chanjet/ai-adapters"]; const updated = []; const missing = []; for (const name of targets) { let found = false; for (const section of sections) { if (pkg[section] && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(pkg[section], name)) { pkg[section][name] = process.env.VERSION; found = true; updated.push(section + ":" + name); } } if (!found) missing.push(name); } if (missing.length) { console.warn("package.json 缺少依赖(已跳过): " + missing.join(", ")); } fs.writeFileSync(pkgPath, JSON.stringify(pkg, null, 2) + "\n"); console.log("已更新依赖: " + updated.join(", "));'; echo "[5/9] package.json 已更新为 $VERSION"

set -eu; STATE=.ai-dev-nova-upgrade; VERSION=$(cat "$STATE/version"); echo "[6/9] 当前变更:"; git status --short package.json; git add package.json; if git diff --cached --quiet; then echo "package.json 无需更新，未生成提交" >&2; exit 1; fi; git commit -m "ZJYF-121254:修改nova版本号为$VERSION"; echo "[6/9] 提交完成: ZJYF-121254:修改nova版本号为$VERSION"
set -eu; STATE=.ai-dev-nova-upgrade; SPRINT_BRANCH=$(cat "$STATE/sprint-branch"); echo "[7/9] 推送分支: $SPRINT_BRANCH"; git push -u origin "$SPRINT_BRANCH"
set -eu; STATE=.ai-dev-nova-upgrade; ORIG_BRANCH=$(cat "$STATE/orig-branch"); echo "[8/9] 切回原分支: $ORIG_BRANCH"; git checkout "$ORIG_BRANCH"

set -eu; STATE=.ai-dev-nova-upgrade; VERSION=$(cat "$STATE/version"); SPRINT_BRANCH=$(cat "$STATE/sprint-branch"); ORIG_BRANCH=$(cat "$STATE/orig-branch"); echo "[9/9] 全部步骤执行成功"; echo "[9/9] nova 版本: $VERSION"; echo "[9/9] sprint 分支: $SPRINT_BRANCH"; echo "[9/9] 已切回原分支: $ORIG_BRANCH"; rm -rf "$STATE"
